---
title: "Lab 5a: Interpolating an Exposure Surface (QGIS)"
subtitle: "Intro GIS for Public Health · QGIS track · Day 5"
---

::: {.lab-download}
[Download this lab (Word)](downloads/Lab05a_Interpolation_QGIS_PH.docx){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm download="Lab05a_Interpolation_QGIS_PH.docx"}
[ArcGIS Online version](lab5a-online.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[ArcGIS Pro version (Word)](downloads/Lab05a_Interpolation_ArcGISPro_PH.docx){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm download="Lab05a_Interpolation_ArcGISPro_PH.docx"}
:::

{{< include _lab5a-qgis.md >}}
